raw_consumer_statement: Items were purchased on a business CitiBank credit card that were never delivered. I am the XXXX for the credit card holder, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX.. The original charge was on XX/XX/XXXX for {$47000.00}. The vendor for the purchase was XXXX XXXX XXXX, which subsequent to the purchase, filed for XXXX  XXXX bankruptcy. The anticipated delivery date of the items purchased was XX/XX/XXXX. In XX/XX/XXXX we learned that XXXX was having financial difficulties. We asked that the items we purchased be delivered. They failed to deliver the items as requested. In XX/XX/XXXX we disputed the original charge with CitiBank. They began an investigation of the issue. After several months, on XX/XX/XXXX during a phone conversation with a customer service supervisor, I was informed that CitiBank would not be crediting our account for the amount, stating that our request to dispute the charge was beyond their time limit for filing a dispute despite the unique circumstances of our situation.
